response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack engineer, but the profile does not align with this embedded networking security role. Core required qualifications are missing: there is no native-level Japanese proficiency, no Linux kernel investigation or source-modification experience, and no exposure to security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X) or L2/L3 networking. C experience is minimal and dated (roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus a bachelor thesis), whereas the role demands strong C for UNIX embedded firmware. The bulk of the experience is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web and platform work.
strengths: Deep, broad senior engineering experience with strong testing/TDD and DevOps practices
Some prior C/C++ work (NI LabWindows/CVI) and a Linux/C++ audio thesis
Demonstrated ability to learn new domains and pick up unfamiliar stacks quickly
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency, a hard requirement
No Linux kernel, embedded firmware, or network-security (MACsec/802.1X) experience
C skills are dated and minimal; not even listed among current skills
